abstract: Comprehensive guide for the @tigrisdata/agent-kit package, designed for AI agents and LLMs building storage workflows for other agents. Covers four building blocks composed from @tigrisdata/storage and @tigrisdata/iam primitives: forks for instant copy-on-write isolated copies of shared datasets (createForks/teardownForks), workspaces for dedicated per-agent buckets with TTL and scoped credentials (createWorkspace/teardownWorkspace), checkpoints for point-in-time bucket snapshots that restore as independent forks (checkpoint/restore/listCheckpoints), and coordination for event-driven multi-agent pipelines via bucket webhooks (setupCoordination/teardownCoordination). Uses progressive disclosure with detailed reference files in resources/ covering fork lifecycle and hyperparameter sweeps, workspace TTL behavior and per-user sandboxes, checkpoint branching trajectories and rollback patterns, and coordination filter syntax and pipeline patterns.
